problem id: 8d6688e9
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(5) AND NOT SHR(5)) XOR NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  01110110 -> 00110011
  00100001 -> 01011011
  01010010 -> 10110111
  01111000 -> 11110011
  11100010 -> 10100111
  11111000 -> 11100111
  00001100 -> 01111110
  01011101 -> 11010110
  00010011 -> 00011101
  01010110 -> 00110111

query: 11110000
predicted answer: 11100111
